testcase.name: test_p0_4_refund_status_update_to_completed

failure.message: AssertionError: Completed refund should have transaction_id after status update assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f5eef71000>('transaction_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f5eef71000> = {'refund': {'account_id': 'acc_d3cd5544', 'amount': 700.0, 'completed_at': '2026-02-06T10:59:12.119191+00:00', 'completed_by': 'test-user-1768140463239', ...}, 'success': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_finance_p0_p1_fixes.py:248: in test_p0_4_refund_status_update_to_completed assert updated_refund.get("transaction_id") is not None, \ E AssertionError: Completed refund should have transaction_id after status update E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f5eef71000>('transaction_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f5eef71000> = {'refund': {'account_id': 'acc_d3cd5544', 'amount': 700.0, 'completed_at': '2026-02-06T10:59:12.119191+00:00', 'completed_by': 'test-user-1768140463239', ...}, 'success': True}.get

testcase.name: test_p1_5_account_duplicate_name_rejected
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_finance_p0_p1_fixes.py:270: in test_p1_5_account_duplicate_name_rejected assert response1.status_code in [200, 201], f"First account creation failed: {response1.text}" E AssertionError: First account creation failed: {"detail":"Account with same bank, branch and type already exists"} E assert 409 in [200, 201] E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_p1_5_account_duplicate_case_insensitive
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_finance_p0_p1_fixes.py:296: in test_p1_5_account_duplicate_case_insensitive assert response1.status_code in [200, 201], f"First account creation failed: {response1.text}" E AssertionError: First account creation failed: {"detail":"Account with same bank, branch and type already exists"} E assert 409 in [200, 201] E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
